title: Thi Online: Các thì hiện tại
summary: 25 câu trắc nghiệm tổng hợp các thì hiện tại: HTĐ, HTTD, HTHT, HTHT tiếp diễn.

sections.heading: Tóm tắt các thì hiện tại
sections.body:
| Thì | Cấu trúc | Dấu hiệu |
|---|---|---|
| **Hiện tại đơn (HTĐ)** | S + V(s/es) | always, often, usually, every day/week... |
| **Hiện tại tiếp diễn (HTTD)** | S + am/is/are + V-ing | now, right now, at the moment, Look!, Listen! |
| **Hiện tại hoàn thành (HTHT)** | S + have/has + V3 | already, yet, just, ever, never, since, for, so far, recently |
| **HTHT tiếp diễn** | S + have/has + been + V-ing | all morning/day, for + thời gian (nhấn mạnh liên tục) |

**Lưu ý quan trọng:**
- Động từ tri giác (smell, taste, see, hear...) và trạng thái (know, want, like, love...) → **không** dùng thì tiếp diễn.
- **This is the first time** + HTHT.
- **Whenever** + HTĐ cho thói quen lặp lại.
- Mệnh đề thời gian (as soon as, when, until...) → **không** dùng will, dùng HTĐ.

exerciseSets.title: Thi Online: Các thì hiện tại

exercises.question: Look! That girl ________ to steal the wallet of that man.
exercises.explanation: Look! → hành động đang xảy ra ngay lúc nói → HTTD: is trying.

exercises.question: I'll give you a call as soon as I ______ Singapore.
exercises.explanation: As soon as + HTĐ (arrive): không dùng will trong mệnh đề trạng ngữ thời gian.

exercises.question: I'm afraid I can't go out with you because I _____________ my assignment yet.
exercises.explanation: Yet → HTHT phủ định. Chủ ngữ I → haven't finished.

exercises.question: He _________ in 70 matches for the national team so far.
exercises.explanation: So far → HTHT: has played. Chủ động vì 'he' tự chơi.

exercises.question: Recently, a group of Australians _________ an amazing campaign to raise awareness about mental health issues.
exercises.explanation: Recently → HTHT: has developed. Chủ ngữ 'a group' (số ít) → has.

exercises.question: My father often _______ sports programs in his free time.
exercises.explanation: Often → HTĐ: thói quen. My father (ngôi 3 số ít) → watches.

exercises.question: The organization ________ to have some voluntary programs to help disabled children since last year.
exercises.explanation: Since last year → HTHT. The organization (số ít) → has planned.

exercises.question: "Where is John?" — "He __________ for an important telephone call in his office."
exercises.explanation: Where is John? → hỏi về hiện tại, hành động đang diễn ra → HTTD: is waiting.

exercises.question: I _______ an art class at the university once a week.
exercises.explanation: Once a week → HTĐ: thói quen. Chủ ngữ I → attend (không thêm s).

exercises.question: The young writer ________ four novels and one collection of essays so far.
exercises.explanation: So far → HTHT: has published.

exercises.question: I heard that the movie at the Roxy Theatre is great, but I ______________ it yet.
exercises.explanation: Yet → HTHT phủ định. Chủ ngữ I → haven't watched.

exercises.question: He __________ his report at the moment. He will bring it into the office when it is complete.
exercises.explanation: At the moment → HTTD: is preparing.

exercises.question: Their son's English ________ recently thanks to a four-month English course.
exercises.explanation: Recently → HTHT: has improved.

exercises.question: Look to your left! Jane _________ her little brother to school. How sweet!
exercises.explanation: Look! → hành động đang xảy ra → HTTD: is bringing.

exercises.question: You won't find Mark at home right now. He ________ shopping with his mom.
exercises.explanation: Right now → HTTD: is going.

exercises.question: He took his car to the service station yesterday, but they ____________ it yet.
exercises.explanation: Yet → HTHT phủ định: haven't fixed — chưa sửa xong cho đến hiện tại.

exercises.question: Every Wednesday my dad _____ to work by train because my mom ______ the car.
exercises.explanation: Every Wednesday → HTĐ. My dad, my mom (ngôi 3 số ít) → goes, needs.

exercises.question: Peter often takes the bus to school, but today his mother _________ him.
exercises.explanation: Today (đối lập với thói quen 'often takes') → HTTD: is driving — hôm nay mẹ đang chở.

exercises.question: You should know that everyone in our company _______ busy preparing for the event for weeks.
exercises.explanation: For weeks → HTHT tiếp diễn. Everyone (số ít) → has been.

exercises.question: The president ___________ for his speech the whole morning. He still isn't finished.
exercises.explanation: The whole morning + still isn't finished → HTHT tiếp diễn: has been preparing — nhấn mạnh quá trình liên tục.

exercises.question: In recent years, there _________ a significant increase in the number of female students.
exercises.explanation: In recent years → HTHT. 'A significant increase' (số ít) → has been.

exercises.question: I have never played golf before. This is the first time I ________ to play.
exercises.explanation: This is the first time + HTHT: have tried — cấu trúc cố định.

exercises.question: ______________, she always brings a novel with her.

options.text: After I have met my beloved teacher
Whenever I meet my beloved teacher
By the time I meet my beloved teacher
Until I will meet my beloved teacher

exercises.explanation: Whenever + HTĐ (meet) → HTĐ (brings): mỗi khi gặp cô giáo, cô ấy luôn mang theo tiểu thuyết.

exercises.question: The two department managers _________ dinner at the moment. We shouldn't disturb them.
exercises.explanation: At the moment → HTTD: are having dinner.

exercises.question: The air _______ strange. There must be something going on in the factory.
exercises.explanation: 'Smell' là động từ tri giác → dùng HTĐ, không dùng thì tiếp diễn: smells.
